combined_text_for_llm: 10 Signs You Have an Iron Deficiency "1/11About 9 percent of women suffer from an iron deficiency, according to the most recent stats from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention—but that number's even higher for physically active women, say experts. How can you tell if your levels are a little low? Be on the lookout for these 1
